content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.23%, Auto leading +2.33%, IT +1.56%, and VIX cooling -5.76% to 17.01. Book is +1.09% on the day with 8 winners. Priority is to lock in gains via SL trails on existing positions rather than chase fresh breakouts; deployment is at 50% but most positions are 0-day held with thin cushion.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1034.83,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +7.4% from entry 984. Current SL 1034.83 is already locking +5.2% gain — solid placement. Holding through. Will revisit trailing higher on close above 1075. No-op MODIFY avoided — keeping documented HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.0%, but VIX cooling and risk-on tape works against gold near-term. SL at 119 (-4.9% from entry) gives room for consolidation. Defensive hedge thesis intact; do not tighten SL on a defensive position that needs room to breathe."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8% with strong technicals (price above all SMAs, MACD bullish). Trailing SL from 402 to 404.50 (entry/breakeven) — locks in zero-loss. Power demand at record 256 GW supports thesis. Q4 results May 15 are catalyst. Tightening per trailing mandate as P&L approaches +2%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.50,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.2%, near 52w high (324.95). Defensive utility, regulated returns. Tightening SL marginally from 318 to 318.50 to give a hair more cushion on capital preservation. Peak power demand 256 GW supportive. Will trail higher if it breaks 325."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 472.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.1%, breaking out above 52w high (476). Strong Q4 results (PAT +11%). Trailing SL from 471 to 472 (entry +0.6%) — locks in small gain above breakeven. Raising target slightly to 495 given breakout structure. Per trailing mandate at +3% gain."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 612.00,
      "new_target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%. Dividend record date tomorrow (Apr 30) — Rs 11/share. Trailing SL from 605 to 612 (breakeven) to protect against post-record-date sell-off, which is highly likely. Dividend will be ~Rs 11 cushion. Locking in zero-loss before ex-div."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.5%. Current SL 1438 is already at entry +1.8% — well-placed lock-in. Stock at fresh 52w high, strong Q4 beat. Letting it run; existing SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4%. Current SL 1742 is at entry +0.46% — already at breakeven plus. Organon $11.75bn deal is a mixed catalyst (leverage concern). MACD turning bearish. Existing SL is appropriately tight; no change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Open BUY LIMIT @ 2400 already in book. Not stacking. Letting it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Open BUY LIMIT @ 23.65 already in book. Not stacking."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Open BUY LIMIT @ 443 already in book. Power cluster already heavy with NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA — letting existing pending order stand without adding more power exposure."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1034.83,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1034.83 already locks +5.2% gain. Will trail above 1075 close. Letting strong post-results momentum run toward 1110 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge needs room. SL at 119 is appropriate cushion. Risk-on tape pressuring gold short-term but thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry +1.8%, well-placed. Volume-led 22.6% revenue growth strongest in FMCG peer group. Riding momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "reasoning": "Trailing to breakeven (entry). Power demand at record highs, Q4 results May 15 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry +0.46% adequate. Organon deal raises leverage but is strategic. MACD bearish — won't loosen, keeping tight."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.50,
      "reasoning": "Slight tightening. Defensive, near 52w high. Will trail more aggressively on break of 325."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 472.00,
      "reasoning": "Breaking out above 52w high. Trailing to entry+0.6% locks in small gain. E-auction premium tailwind."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 612.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing to breakeven before tomorrow's dividend ex-date. Rs 11 dividend cushion accrues; protects against post-ex-div drift."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK, MARUTI, CEATLTD, INTELLECT, GRSE, BHARTIARTL all show momentum — but book is already 50% deployed with thin cushion (avg P&L per position ~+2%) and 5-day rolling stats are POOR (14% win rate, profit factor 0.4x). Per deployment hysteresis, focus is on managing existing book, not adding. Will revisit fresh entries tomorrow if (a) overall book P&L holds and (b) any of these names offer pullback entries to VWAP. ONGC, RELIANCE, BAJFINANCE are energy/financial cluster — already heavy via COALINDIA/NTPC/POWERGRID/PNBHOUSING.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Critical context: 5-day rolling profit factor is 0.4x with 14% win rate — strategy has been LOSING. Today's +1.09% unrealized is the first real cushion. Priority #1 today is converting unrealized gains to realized via disciplined SL trails, NOT adding new positions. Current cluster exposure: Energy/Power = NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA = ~21% of capital — at the cluster discipline threshold. Will not add more power/energy names. Financial Services = PNBHOUSING ~8.4%. Pending TATAPOWER order would push power cluster too heavy if filled — monitoring. Capital preservation mode."
}
